title: Humpback whale fluke in Glacier Bay
description: A humpback whale (Megaptera novaeangliae) lifting its fluke above the water in Glacier Bay, with snow-capped mountains in the background. Humpback whale song has been recorded via a hydrophone anchored in Bartlett Cove since 2000.
alt: A humpback whale fluke rising above calm water in front of snow-capped mountains in Glacier Bay
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-11 — downloaded from nps.gov Humpback Whales in Glacier Bay page, visually confirmed
